markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To introduce new tools and a mandatory time-tracking process for post-pipeline editing.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Mandatory Time Tracking:** Use Time Doctor to track post-pipeline editing time (from Atlas output to client-ready). This data will identify pipeline bottlenecks and guide engineering resource allocation.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**New Google Doc Comment Pipeline:** A new Atlas pipeline automates scraping client feedback from Google Docs, replacing manual processes and standardizing a common workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Prioritize Artifact Conflict Checks:** Review the artifact conflict guide to ensure clean, efficient pipeline outputs. Unresolved conflicts create "weird tangles of logic" that degrade performance.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [**File Detailed Tickets:** When reporting issues, include specific Atlas URLs and pipeline logs to accelerate diagnosis and resolution by the growing client ops engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Topics

### Time Doctor Implementation

  - [**Goal:** Gather empirical data on post-pipeline editing time to identify bottlenecks and prioritize engineering resources.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [**Scope:** Time tracked is the window from Atlas output to client-ready state. This excludes publishing tasks (e.g., Webflow checks), which are a separate process.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [**Tool:** Time Doctor, used in manual Pomodoro mode.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
      - [**Privacy:** No screenshots, video, or keylogging.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [**Data Collected:** Time spent and apps used during active timers.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
    1.  [Run Atlas generations.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
    2.  [Start a Time Doctor timer for each piece of content.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
    3.  [Edit content to a client-ready state.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
    4.  [Stop the timer.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [**Setup:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [Download and install Time Doctor.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [Use a simple Atlas pipeline to populate deliverables with actual article titles, replacing generic placeholders.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [**PSEO/Batch Content:** Track as a single block of time for the entire batch.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Honest data is critical. High times are an opportunity for engineering help, not a performance metric. Hiding issues prevents Atlas from improving.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

### New Google Doc Comment Pipeline

  - [**Problem:** Over 200 non-standard processes exist for scraping client feedback from Google Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new Atlas pipeline automates this task, standardizing the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Setup:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [**Self-Service:** Copy the pipeline YAML into your workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - [**Support:** File a ticket if unfamiliar with pipeline setup.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Context:** This is an interim solution. The long-term goal is for clients to comment directly within Atlas's Content OS, which will make this pipeline obsolete.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

### Workflow Standardization & Best Practices

  - [**Goal:** Move all external processes ("hacks") into standardized Atlas workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [**Method:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
      - [**Self-Service:** Implement post-processing steps directly in Atlas artifacts (e.g., proofreader checklists, assignment directions).](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
      - [**Support:** File detailed tickets for complex tasks that require engineering help to migrate into Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [**Artifact Conflict Checks:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [**Action:** Review the artifact conflict guide.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [**Why:** Unresolved conflicts create "weird tangles of logic trees" that degrade pipeline performance and output quality.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [Review the artifact conflict guide.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [Install Time Doctor and begin tracking post-pipeline editing time.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [Use the new Google Doc comment pipeline (self-service or via ticket).](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - [When reporting issues, include specific Atlas URLs and pipeline logs.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
      - [Finalize the process for requesting manual time edits in Time Doctor.](https://fathom.video/share/DzTQzzsezxPZVBs9g5AN2UmRHLvabi_3?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
